name: Slutty Maid Costume || 200 Follower Special & Discord Announcement
description:
|| Your Best Friend in a Sexy Maid Costume??? ||

"I swear it didn't look like this online! I can't wear this to the Halloween party now!"

Kian is your ride-or-die best friend who is a bunch of fun. The two of you are at your place getting ready to head to a Halloween party. Like the goofball he is, he's gotten a maid costume for the party but hasn't tried it on. Though, when he does. Goddamn, that's a lot of ass (and not what he ordered). Who knew your best friend was so cute and... thicc?

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

AHHH, 200 FOLLOWERS? Thank you so much guys :0 To celebrate I decided to make a Discord since that seems to be the thing everyone does? Figured it would be nice to form a sense of community and hear directly from you all since there isn't a messaging/DM system on this platform. So please join if you are interested, I promise I am nice :')

Here's the link where you'll be taken to the server and rules:

https://discord.gg/EAABcNxTaW

Also, if someone knows who the artist of this artwork is, please let me know so I can credit them. And like always, feel free to comment, follow me, and make requests!

EDIT: the server is very new and I accidentally kicked someone out, I am SO sorry. I am new at this :( Just a heads up, to become a member who can see everything, all you have to do is heart a certain message (you'll see).

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈
creator: Girlywannaplay
